query: SELECT cp.id as cpa_project_id, cp.project_name, pc.id as pc_id, cm.code, cm.trade_name, pc.status FROM cpa_projects cp JOIN cpa_project_consultants pc ON pc.cpa_project_id = cp.id JOIN cpa_consultants_master cm ON cm.id = pc.consultant_id WHERE cm.code = 'AAEC';
